creator: freebsd@alan.batie.org
text:
I just installed ucd-snmp 4.2.6 from the ports tree, and while it's 
true, it no longer goes into an infinite loop, now it just errors out with:

udp.ipv6UdpTable.ipv6UdpEntry.ipv6UdpLocalAddress.'................'.4506.0 
= 0:0:0:0:0:0:0:0
udp.ipv6UdpTable.ipv6UdpEntry.ipv6UdpLocalAddress.'................'.161.0 
= 0:0:0:0:0:0:0:0
Error: OID not increasing: 
udp.ipv6UdpTable.ipv6UdpEntry.ipv6UdpLocalAddress.'................'.4506.0 
 >= 
udp.ipv6UdpTable.ipv6UdpEntry.ipv6UdpLocalAddress.'................'.161.0

It's still impossible to walk the snmp tree as a result.  I'm not sure 
if the problem is the kernel giving bad data or snmpd screwing up 
somehow (though the former seems more likely given the error), but it's 
still a problem, as of FreeBSD 4.8-STABLE #0: Sat Apr 19
